objective: Make the LifeMax public app feel more credible and functional by adding browser-local memory candidate management without claiming backend or live integration readiness.
truth_boundary: Memory candidates are browser-local demo records only.
No WHOOP, account sync, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, backend memory, reminders, or cross-device sync are connected by this slice.
The LifeMax lab boot/preflight remains red, so daily shared-context usability is not claimed.
implementation_summary: Added MemoryStatus candidate/kept/rejected and normalized legacy localStorage memory records.
Added active/candidate/kept/rejected memory summaries to Today derivation and local export summary.
Added Today Memory inbox with edit, keep, reject, restore, and delete controls that persist in localStorage.
Preserved kept/rejected same-source memory decisions when new source events create fresh candidates; only unreviewed same-source candidates are replaced.
Updated Profile and Privacy copy to show active/kept/rejected memory status honestly.
Added unit migration tests for legacy, mixed, and unknown memory statuses.
Extended Playwright smoke to create memory candidates from real flows, edit, keep, reject, delete, refresh, restore, and verify export counts.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Existing unit fixture used old memory shape after schema evolution.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Updated fixture and added migration coverage for old/mixed/unknown statuses.
defects_found_and_repaired.rerun: npm run typecheck and npm run test passed.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Vitest was first run with unsupported Jest --runInBand flag.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Reran using repo-native npm run test command.
defects_found_and_repaired.rerun: npm run test passed: 3 files, 12 tests.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Playwright assertion became ambiguous after memory detail textarea duplicated evening-close text.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Scoped assertion to Memory inbox summary.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Memory edit/keep success feedback disappeared because the row remounted on updated_at key changes.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Stabilized MemoryCandidateItem key to candidate id.
defects_found_and_repaired.rerun: npm run typecheck and npm run screenshot:mobile passed.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Loose Playwright text selectors for kept/rejected counts were ambiguous between header pill and count row.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Scoped assertions to aria-label Memory counts.

commands_run.command: redacted changed-file scan for secret-shaped strings

flow: save midday rescue and evening close
return to Today and verify five memory candidates
edit first memory, keep it, reject one, delete one
restore rejected memory, delete another, verify Profile/export counts
open Privacy and confirm local-only copy

in_app_browser_inspection.details: Memory inbox rendered; counts visible; privacy links present; Today/Capture/Patterns/Experiments/Profile routes present; consoleErrors empty.

deployed_smoke.flow: On both aliases, saved quick restart, midday rescue, and evening close; verified 3 memory candidates; edited and kept one, rejected one, deleted one; refreshed and verified persistence; opened Profile export and verified kept/rejected counts.

fixes_integrated: Acceptance proof is behavior-based, not feature-exists based.
Profile uses derived memory summary rather than raw memory candidate length.
Kept/rejected memory decisions survive new same-source candidate creation.

deployment.approval: PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote was provided earlier in this goal thread.

live_smoke.flow: On both aliases, saved quick restart, midday rescue, and evening close; verified 3 memory candidates; edited and kept one, rejected one, deleted one; refreshed and verified persistence; opened Profile export and verified kept/rejected counts.

stop_continue_decision: checkpoint, not complete: memory inbox product code and proof are pushed/deployed/smoked on both public aliases; shared-context/Wave 1 readiness remains red and unproved.
